meta.title: Barbara / Baked Bean | Ambassadors
meta.description: Our cockroach colony was started with 7 roaches that were part of an educational colony at a school in Pennsylvania.

data.name: Barbara / Baked Bean
data.story: Our cockroach colony was started with 7 roaches that were part of an educational colony at a school in Pennsylvania.
data.mission: They are ambassadors for the importance of invertebrates and the misconceptions they face.
